title: Prognostic/biologic cards (STAG2, TP53, CDKN2A, characteristic copy-number changes), cited + graded
context: The prognostic/biologic cards cover STAG2, TP53, CDKN2A, and characteristic copy-number changes, reporting prognostic associations with evidence level, population context, and explicit uncertainty - and never an individual prognosis or treatment implication. MEDIUM risk-tier research reference, gated on a TO-BE-SECURED domain reviewer. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Draft the STAG2/TP53/CDKN2A/copy-number prognostic cards reporting prognostic associations with evidence level, population context, and explicit uncertainty, with no individual prognosis or treatment implication, cited + provenance-backed, and domain-reviewer sign-off recorded.
acceptanceCriteria: STAG2/TP53/CDKN2A/copy-number cards report prognostic associations with their evidence level, population context, and explicit uncertainty
No individual prognosis or treatment implication; cited + provenance-backed; carries the 'research reference - not clinical guidance' frame
Domain-reviewer sign-off recorded (reviewer TO BE SECURED)
